Site Visit Report

Project
Fairways
Date
July 23, 2026
Prepared For
Sanchez
Prepared By
Juliette Calaf Interiors

KITCHEN

Electrical and piping rough-in is in process. Tubing and electrical boxes are being installed per the kitchen floor plan.

LAUNDRY ROOM

Wall partition removal is complete. The partition is being relocated four inches back as planned.
220v wiring for the stove is in process, routing from the main panel.

MASTER BEDROOM

TV electrical wiring is being routed from the lower plug on the left wall.
The existing AC unit will be tested. A new unit and location will be proposed and quoted.

MASTER BATHROOM

The junction box has been rewired from its previous wall location to the vanity wall. This will remain covered as it host power connections for girl's bedroom and part of the house.
Wiring for the ceiling lamp is in process.

GENERAL AREAS

The AC vendor visited site to assess the existing machines and possible location for the new unit. A startup of all machines will follow to confirm everything is in working order.
The sliding doors are currently being evaluated to compare the cost difference between repairing the existing doors and installing new ones.
Mezzanine metal materials have been delivered to begin construction.
